title: realloc Semantics and Transactional Growth · Object-Lifetime Lens: Realloc Temporary Pointer
summary: A dynamic event list grows under memory pressure and loses its only pointer when resizing fails. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem realloc temporary pointer increment in amortized vector with failure invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.
Preserve the first causal error while still recording cleanup failures and resource state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Realloc Temporary Pointer · Theory Realloc Temporary Pointer
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 8653. Produce bounded C evidence to grow capacity without losing the old allocation on failure; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.
